retracted_claims.claim: The old learned-system design was frozen and authorized.
retracted_claims.reason: The frozen vehicle and evidence stack fail the reset contracts.

retracted_claims.claim: The Gumbel operator was built, fast, and strength-neutral (including 1370 games/hour and stale 12-4/24-8 reads).
retracted_claims.reason: The measured operator was not the specified pure operator; short-game throughput and stale/hidden binary reads cannot authorize it.

retracted_claims.claim: Completed-Q was correct and round 1 was authorized by 35-29, 11-5, and 16-0.
retracted_claims.reason: Legacy c=12 targets fail adversarial Mctx semantics and the receipts are dirty/event-empty.

retracted_claims.claim: The final champion/solo gate was frozen and local 0.787/0.8194 references were authoritative.
retracted_claims.reason: The arm shorthand was not the registered champion and the final identity, seeds, events, and pure vehicle were not frozen.

retracted_claims.claim: The 31-1 legacy beam-versus-policy result passed Gate-0b and authorized the operator.
retracted_claims.reason: It did not test the specified Gumbel/completed-Q operator or curve and has no reconstructible pair stream.

retracted_claims.claim: Gate-0a established registered-champion survival recall and roughly 5x lift.
retracted_claims.reason: The table peaks at 3.1x and default-CC2 rollouts were rescored with a different profile; neither arm is the immutable registered champion.
Legacy schema, identity, seed, counterbalance, provenance, and resume contracts are incomplete.

retracted_claims.claim: The driver and rounds 1-11 constituted a valid compounding campaign.
retracted_claims.reason: Every lineage round inherits reset-wide defects; the driver uses raw paths, mutable mixes, overlapping seeds, completion-order gates, and empty events.

retracted_claims.claim: The learned bot's single-player baseline was 0.0 and later July solo aggregates supported comparison.
retracted_claims.reason: Solo bypassed run receipts and the learned path was contaminated by hidden/impure vehicle behavior.

retracted_claims.source: Map/tickets/commit subjects describing v3 or rounds 6-11 as fully learned
retracted_claims.claim: The historical net-search path was fully learned and venue-conditioned.
retracted_claims.reason: serve.rs composes hand attack reward, beam.rs applies SPEC_DECAY, and production opponent/venue context stays default.

retracted_claims.source: T03/T04/T16 and scratch champion/anchor reads using tp:cc2 or beam:cc2
retracted_claims.claim: The shorthand selected the registered probe-tp128d9 attack-tuned champion.
retracted_claims.reason: Arm parsing uses default CC2 weights while the registered champion and datagen teacher use attack-tuned weights.

retracted_claims.claim: The registered champion ran at 278 games/hour.
retracted_claims.reason: That row used the wrong default-weight shorthand; only the microbenchmark diagnosis remains descriptive.

retracted_claims.source: T16 — rounds 1-10 results and causal amendments
retracted_claims.claim: Promotion, anchor, and mechanism narratives proved or disproved compounding.
retracted_claims.reason: Invalid ancestry, vehicle selection, identities, overlapping seeds, dirty builds, and empty streams make all authorization and causal reads void.

retracted_claims.claim: Round 11 could promote or seed the clean lineage.
retracted_claims.reason: Explicit per-child selection does not repair legacy shards, target, purity, context, identity, seed, replay, resume, and receipt defects.

retracted_claims.claim: The four listed populations totalled 887,344 decisions.
retracted_claims.reason: The listed counts sum to 831,518; the prose total was corrected and remains descriptive without input manifests.

retracted_claims.claim: The grounded Round 11 half produced 72 shards.
retracted_claims.reason: The observed corpus contains 92 grounded shards; the receipt itself omits shard count and hashes.

retracted_claims.claim: July 0.0/0.225/0.787/0.8194 aggregates were validity-grade solo baselines.
retracted_claims.reason: The solo command emitted only aggregate stdout and bypassed dirty refusal, run spec, and per-game events.

path_quarantines.reason: Every July 8 duel/gate receipt is dirty and event-empty.
Known July 9 receipts and any later in-flight Round 11 receipts are non-promotable.
The entire live legacy Round 11 subtree is excluded from the clean lineage.
